scripts.dev:check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run dev:smoke
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/api-client typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/api test && bun run --cwd packages/api-client test && bun run --cwd apps/cli test
